_publications._publicationTitle: Development of the PROMIS pediatric stigma and extension to the PROMIS pediatric stigma: skin item banks.

_contextSnippet: When using the PPS-Skin...all sample 1 subjects had a reliability ≥ 0.7; of them, 93.6% had a reliability ≥ 0.9
details: IRT-based reliability > 0.7 for all subjects with skin conditions; 93.6% had reliability ≥ 0.9
